text: The thing nobody talks about at Thanksgiving dinner but everyone is thinking about: _____.
Scientists have finally discovered the cause of Mondays. Apparently it's _____.
My therapist says I need to stop obsessing over _____. My therapist is wrong.
Breaking news: local person ruins perfectly good party by bringing _____.
New life hack: if you're ever running late to work, just blame _____. Works every time.
In my will, I am leaving everything to _____. My family is furious.
The secret ingredient in grandma's famous recipe was, surprisingly, _____.
This year's hottest fashion trend: accessorizing everything with _____.
Customer review, five stars: '_____' changed my life. I will never recover.
Job listing: seeking motivated candidate to handle _____. Must be comfortable with chaos.
The coroner's report listed the cause of death as _____. Nobody was surprised.
In an unexpected plot twist, the villain's evil plan turned out to be _____.
I've made peace with mortality. What terrifies me is _____.
The haunted house was scary, but nothing was as unsettling as _____.
When the apocalypse comes, survivors will miss electricity, running water, and _____.
The wizard's most powerful spell? Summoning _____.
The legendary artifact of power, lost for a thousand years, turned out to be _____.
Dragons are feared for their fire, their wings, and their ability to breathe _____.
The chosen one's destiny was to defeat the dark lord using only _____.
Every hero needs a mentor. Mine taught me the ancient art of _____.
The greatest gift you can give someone: _____.
Things that hit differently at 3 AM: _____.
Honestly? The best part of any road trip is _____.
The only thing standing between me and my dreams is _____.
I believe everything happens for a reason. That reason is usually _____.
Coming this fall: a new reality show where strangers compete using only _____ to survive.
My dating profile honestly just says: looking for someone who appreciates _____.
They said I could become anything. So I became _____. Worth it? Debatable.
The unwritten rule of every group chat: never, ever mention _____ before noon.
My bucket list has one item on it: _____. I keep adding backup plans just in case.
